name: MAUMELLE CHARTER ELEMENTARY SCHOOL
note: Representative point for the Academics Plus Public Charter Schools LEA (SIS state_leaid 6040700), a multi-campus network (also operates Maumelle Charter Middle/High and Scott Charter School) -- shown at its Maumelle Charter Elementary campus. Joined via crosswalk_lea_nces.csv's LEAID (0500059), not name -- NCES's school-level names for charter networks routinely diverge from the authorizer/LEA name, so a name search for 'Academics Plus' finds nothing even though NCES has full records.
map_caveat: This marker represents Academics Plus Public Charter Schools, which also operates campuses in Maumelle (middle and high school) and at Scott Charter School -- enrollment shown is for the whole network, not just this location.

name: GARFIELD SCHOLARS' ACADEMY
note: Opened 2024-25 (SIS state_leaid 0448700); too new for NCES EDGE's SY2022-23 school-locations vintage -- NCES's own CCD LEA universe (crosswalk_lea_nces.csv) already has it under LEAID 0514498, just not yet geocoded. myschoolinfo.arkansas.gov's district page only lists a PO Box; the physical address (18432 Marshall St, Garfield, AR 72732) came from ADE's open-enrollment-charter locator (adedata.arkansas.gov/LEA/Home/oec) and was geocoded via the Census Geocoding Services API (onelineaddress, benchmark Public_AR_Current), exact match.

name: SIATECH HIGH CHARTER
note: This is Graduate Arkansas Charter (SIS state_leaid 6052700) -- NCES's school-level NAME field carries a legacy CMO name, 'SIATECH,' unrelated to the current authorizer name, which is why a name search for 'Graduate Arkansas' finds nothing. Joined via crosswalk_lea_nces.csv's LEAID (0500407), not name.

name: INSTITUTE FOR THE CREATIVE ARTS
note: Opened 2024-25 (SIS state_leaid 6641700); too new for NCES EDGE's SY2022-23 vintage -- NCES's CCD LEA universe already has it under LEAID 0514500, just not yet geocoded. Physical address (1101 Riverfront Drive, Fort Smith, AR 72901, confirmed via ADE and independent web sources) could not be resolved by the Census Geocoding Services API -- Riverfront Drive is a newly built/renamed downtown road not yet in TIGER's address-range data (even a house-number-less query for the street alone returned zero matches, and a different benchmark didn't help). Geocoded via OpenStreetMap Nominatim instead (user-approved fallback for this one entry); Nominatim matched the street but not the specific house number, so this coordinate is street-level, not the exact building footprint.
map_caveat: This marker's position is approximate -- pinpointed to the street, not the exact building, due to a mapping-data gap for this newly built road.

name: PREMIER HIGH SCHOOL OF LITTLE ROCK

map_caveat: This marker represents Premier High Schools of Arkansas, which also operates campuses in Fort Smith, Texarkana, and online -- enrollment shown is for the whole network, not just this location.
